---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Eidetic OS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use case

What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and in what workflow? Concrete
scenarios are more persuasive than abstract ones.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working — new CLI subcommand, flag, script, config option,
doc, etc. Sketch the interface if you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is preferable. Existing
workarounds, if any.

## Additional context

<!--
Anything else: links, prior art, related issues. Eidetic OS is a public,
local-first template — features that improve portability, privacy, or safety are
especially welcome. Keep examples free of personal data or PII.
-->
